title: Vanilla+ Mobs
description: This Datapack adds multiple of new mobs to your Minecraft World for a better vanilla experience!
body:
![Title says "Vanilla+ Mobs"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/378220748ab8699e847bb8b45121bc77d64f5b8c.png)
________________________________________________________________________________________________
Ever thinking vanilla mobs are pretty common to find and fight against..?
No worries, then this Datapack will help as this added more mobs to fight ranging from passive creatures to dangerous monsters. This Datapack has it all. For now, this Datapack is not a finished project as there will be more monsters and creatures to be added in the future...
________________________________________________________________________________________________
![Title says "Future Plans"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d947f55263124f28f3d0a43c6c996a1158700342.png)
- ### Creepy Crawlies 👁️
________________________________________________________________________________________________
![Title says "Frequently Asked Questions"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04b8f99b8ca38d239c644db1c114911861aff1b8.png)
**What version of Minecraft does it supports? :** Version 1.20.2 

**Is there function commands for mobs & items? :** Yes, there are function commands for both mobs and items.

**What type of Minecraft does it supports? :** Java Edition 
________________________________________________________________________________________________
![Title says "Compatibility"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a24d04d8e85cf2eaf8b45ef124fbbcda4021f6a5.png)
**Datapacks:** Any World Generation Datapack (Not including Mobs)

**Mods:** [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality)
________________________________________________________________________________________________
![Title says "Importance"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d8afaf48eb552793d7a12b0313e198b797e79bf.png)
You are not allow to post the datapack anywhere else without my permission!

For those people who wanted to use this Datapack for a video is allow, but under one condition which is having a **PMC/Modrinth** link to the DP site. That will be appreciated and Thank you!

**Planet Minecraft Link:** [https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/vanilla-mobs-5870988/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/vanilla-mobs-5870988/)
